headline: Hormuz Reopen Deal 🛳️🍑 Trump 🍊🤝 Iran 💣💸
text:
US 🍔 Trump 🍊🤝 Iran 💣💸 & Pak PM Shehbaz Sharif 📦🕊️ just SEALED 🤝 a 14-point MOU 🖋️🔥 to end all beef 🥩💥 after Feb 28 US/Israel STRIKES 🔥🇮🇷 that got Iran firing rockets 🚀😡 back at Israel & Gulf pals! Hormuz Strait 🛳️🌊 – the 20% OIL 🍑⛽ & LNG GAS 🧴💨 SUPERHIGHWAY – gonna REOPEN 🚪💦 right away, no more Iran toll booth 💸🚫! In return, US lifts BLOCKADE 🛑🚢 on Iranian ships 🛳️😩 so they can SLAY again! 

Next 60 DAYS 🗓️⏳ Iran gotta yeet 🗑️ all that ENRICHED URANIUM ☢️🍌 on-site, then ship it out 🛫 so no nuke bomb vibes 💣🚫! No cash 💵 upfront – only staged 💃 ECONOMIC GLOW-UP 🌍📈 with SANCTIONS LIFTED 🔓🆓 & assets unfrozen 🧊💸 after Iran stops funding Hezbollah & proxies 🧔‍♂️💣! 

Israel 🇮🇱 not invited to this party 🎉 but the deal also wants to END Israel-Hezbollah beef 🥩🤝 in Lebanon 🏠! Iran Foreign Min Seyed Abbas Araghchi 📺🗣️ says Supreme Council 🤴🔥 has both fans & haters 😍😡 of the terms, but once they greenlight ✅ it gets SIGNED remotely 🖥️📜! Trump 🍊 already CANCELLED scheduled attacks 🛑💣 cuz 'we made a GREAT settlement' 🍆✍️, while Iran media dropped alleged details that Trump called FAKE NEWS 🤡📜! 

Pakistan & Qatar played cupid 💘🤝 & now everyone’s CAUTIOUSLY OPTIMISTIC 😌🙏 that this time it sticks! Araghchi says first line of the MOU is BLOCKADE LIFT 🚫🛳️ & Hormuz admin won’t be the same 🛣️🍆 – free passage for all ships now, no more fees! As soon as final tweaks done, deal DROPS in DAYS 📆🔥 & Araghchi is HOPEFUL AF 🤞! US officials stress it’s all PERFORMANCE-BASED 🏋️‍♂️✅ – Iran only gets the bag 💰 when verified, no trust fall vibes! 

Cautious optimism from US, Iran, Pak & Qatar – variations almost happened before but this one feels DIFFERENT 😎💯! If approved, ceasefire EXTENDED 🕊️⏰ & nuke talks BEGIN later – Iran swears program is for ELECTRICITY ⚡ & RESEARCH 🧪, not bombs 💣! World’s oil & gas gonna FLOW 🌊🍑 again once Hormuz reopens & blockade gone – global economy about to CUM 💦📈 to record highs!
